warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
10 AMRAP
6 Burpee Box Overs
6 T2B
6 Box Dips or Ring Dips

gymnastics:
T2B Bar Progression
1-2 mins False Grip on bar - focus on Knuckles Up
EMOM x 3
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 3
Bigger Beat Swing - Push Down on Bar
- Put Ball between feet - Reach Long in the Arch - Dont bend the knees
EMOM x 3
Knees to Chest - Aggressive & Pop - pause
EMOM x 6
Beat Swing with Straight legs - to target
Aim for height without losing tension.
E1.5MOM x4 - 30 Second Hold to Support - Rings or Parrallete
EMOM x 4 Bench Dips x 10
EMOM x 4 Banded Dips
EMOM x 4 Strict Dips
EMOM x 6 Kipping Dip Practice

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today emphasizes pressing and core work; address posterior chain and back to balance and prevent imbalances.

siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: T2B Bar Progression. Metcon: AMRAP: 6 Burpee Box Overs, 6 T2B, 6 Box Dips or Ring Dips. For hypertrophy, focus on back, legs, hamstrings.
